name: substitution
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.substitutions.every(s => typeof s.sub === 'string' && typeof s.ratio === 'string')
_note: cooking.substitution looks up known cooking substitutions (butter/egg/milk/flour/sugar/cream) by substring match and returns found:true with the sub table, or found:false with a single 'No common substitutions found' placeholder (so substitutions.length is always >= 1). Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro; tolerates the double-wrapped { artifact: { data: { ingredient } } } client body. No DB/network, never throws. Pinned by server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js.
